title: minuartia umbellulifera subsp. pontica
intro: Minuartia umbellulifera subsp. pontica, also known as Pontic mini cress, is a flowering plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is a type of succulent plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Eastern European folk medicine. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as improve digestion and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Minuartia umbellulifera subsp. pontica can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
